title: Jemmy
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Jemmy''' was a [[Gambling/Legends|gambler]] who was found on the ''[[Ananuru Express]]'' when [[Hakon deVille]] was auctioning a secret [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] brainwashing virus. He, along with [[Tol (gambler)|Tol]] and [[Chral]], knew nothing about the auction and were just there to win money from rich people. He was pleasant and amiable and when a fight broke out he simply stayed under cover.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
